children.textContent: Let's figure out which goblin is responsible. Answer 4 weird questions. Get a tiny action plan.

children.textContent: 💬 When emotions are overloaded, words get hard. These scripts help you protect relationships without burning energy you don't have.

children.textContent: Consider sending the "Ask for space" script before your next interaction.
